summary: Tested Iteration 26 features: Live Match Refresh Status + Model Consensus Indicator. All backend endpoints working correctly. Frontend UI components verified. Fixed minor bug in refresh result banner showing 'undefined'.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/schedule returns correct counts (0 live, 9 completed, 61 upcoming, 70 total)
Backend: GET /api/live/current returns live_matches array with count 0
Backend: POST /api/matches/refresh-live-status returns 'No live matches to check' when no live matches
Backend: POST /api/matches/{matchId}/check-status returns sportmonks_status, is_live, is_finished for completed match
Backend: POST /api/matches/{matchId}/check-status returns is_live=false, is_finished=false for upcoming match
Backend: POST /api/matches/{matchId}/check-status returns error for invalid match
Backend: ipl2026_008 verified in completed matches
Backend: ipl2026_009 verified in completed matches
Frontend: Live tab shows 'No live matches found.' when count is 0
Frontend: Refresh Matches button visible on Live tab with data-testid='refresh-live-btn'
Frontend: Completed tab shows count of 9 matches
Frontend: Clicking Refresh Matches calls refresh-live-status and shows result banner
Frontend: Check Status button visible on live match page with data-testid='check-status-btn'
Frontend: Dual prediction models section visible with data-testid='dual-prediction-models'
Frontend: Claude Opus Prediction panel visible with data-testid='claude-live-prediction'
Frontend: Refresh Both button visible with data-testid='refresh-predictions-btn'
skipped_tests: Frontend: Model Consensus Indicator - requires both weightedPred AND claudePred with historical_factors (no live match available)
Frontend: Match Completed banner - requires SportMonks to confirm match is finished (API doesn't have this match)
critical_code_review_comments: refresh-live-status endpoint (lines 757-866) correctly checks all live matches against SportMonks + CricAPI fallback
check-status endpoint (lines 670-704) correctly returns sportmonks_status, is_live, is_finished
live/current endpoint (lines 707-753) correctly returns live_matches array
Model Consensus Indicator (LiveMatch.js lines 348-384) correctly computes consensus level based on prediction difference
Fixed: Refresh result banner now handles 'message' field from API response

success_rate.frontend: 90% (all visible UI components verified, 2 features require live match data)

test_credentials: No authentication required - open access app
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 26 features implemented correctly. The refresh-live-status endpoint successfully moved 2 previously-live matches (ipl2026_008, ipl2026_009) to completed status. Current state: 0 live, 9 completed, 61 upcoming. The Model Consensus Indicator will only appear when BOTH weighted prediction AND Claude prediction are present - this requires a live match with fresh SportMonks data and Claude generating historical_factors. The Match Completed banner will appear when check-status confirms a match is finished via SportMonks API.

refresh_live_status.description: POST /api/matches/refresh-live-status checks all live matches against SportMonks/CricAPI
refresh_live_status.verification: API returns correct response structure with still_live and completed arrays

schedule_counts.verification: Verified via API test - counts match expected state

check_status.verification: API returns correct fields for completed and upcoming matches

live_current.verification: API returns empty array with count 0 (no live matches)

refresh_matches_button.description: Refresh Matches button visible on Live tab with data-testid='refresh-live-btn'
refresh_matches_button.verification: Button visible and functional, calls refresh-live-status endpoint

no_live_matches_message.description: Live tab shows 'No live matches found.' when count is 0

check_status_button.description: Check Status button visible on live match page with data-testid='check-status-btn'

model_consensus_indicator.description: Model Consensus Indicator between Weighted and Claude predictions
model_consensus_indicator.verification: Code verified in LiveMatch.js lines 348-384, requires both predictions to display

match_completed_banner.description: Match completed banner shows when match is finished with data-testid='match-completed-banner'
match_completed_banner.verification: Code verified in LiveMatch.js lines 209-226, requires SportMonks confirmation

bug_fix.description: Fixed refresh result banner showing 'undefined matches still live'
bug_fix.fix: Added handling for 'message' field from API response and default value for still_live_count
